# M.O.B.I.™ · Pull Request v1.2.2

## Summary
Clearly explain the changes introduced in this PR. If it's a UI change, consider adding a screenshot.

## Connections
- **Issue:** Closes #X
- **SPEC:** docs/specs/spec-vX.Y.Z.md
  
## Type of Change
- [x] `feat`: New feature (Spec-driven)
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix
- [ ] `hotfix`: Critical production fix (SPEC bypass)
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation/SPEC update
- [ ] `style`: UI/UX, Branding, Assets (Logos/SVGs)
- [ ] `chore`: Build/Gradle/Kover (Config)

## Quality Assurance
**How Has This Been Tested?**
- [ ] Unit Tests (JUnit/Kover)
- [ ] Manual UI verification
- [ ] Reproduce steps

## Definition of Done (from SPEC)
- [ ] Code follows M.O.B.I.™ style guide.
- [ ] **Self-review completed** (no "debug" logs or commented code).
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable).
- [ ] All tests pass in CI/CD (if applicable).
- [ ] **SPEC requirements met** (Verified against SPEC criteria).
